description: Pediatric acute severe asthma exacerbation — high-complexity MDM. Tests: (1) 99215 vs under-coding to 99214, (2) CXR professional component with modifier 26, (3) high-MDM recognition from systemic steroids + hospital admission considered.

key_challenges: under-coding trap: 99214 vs 99215 — agent must recognise HIGH MDM from systemic steroids + hospital admission considered
modifier 26 required on CXR: physician interpreted imaging without owning equipment
two simultaneous problems: severe asthma exacerbation (chronic with acute exacerbation) + possible pneumonia (new acute)
